title: Adding 'Formula editor' to the custom recipe trigger

posts.author: Prathmesh07 (Prathmesh Patil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there any way to add ‘Formula’ editor to the recipe sentence in custom recipes ?

(I haven’t found any ‘formula column type’ in the ‘Allowed column types’ section as shown below

image844×642 25.4 KB

My recipe sentence is somewhat as follows :

“when column changes, perform operation (Formula) and add it to the result column”

I want to make sure that I can add my own formulas (supported by monday such as UPPER/LOWER/IF/OR etc.) as per my requirement)

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Prathmesh07,

The formula column isn’t currently supported in our automations. We encourage you to add your vote to the existing feature request here to put greater emphasis on this request
